_doc: Schema Article per a cada peca de blog (/article-*). Inclou author, publisher, datePublished, dateModified, image, articleSection, wordCount, inLanguage. Critic per a E-E-A-T (Experience-Expertise-Authoritativeness-Trustworthiness). El sistema actual de papik.cat NO mostra autor ni dates als articles — corregir aixo es prioritat S4.
_author_strategy: Decisio: usar 'PAPIK Group' com a Organization-author (mes simple, mes coherent), o 'Papik Fisas Moreno' com a Person-author (mes E-E-A-T). Recomanacio: Person-author per a articles tecnics, Organization-author per a notes de premsa.
headline: {{ARTICLE_HEADLINE}}
